title: Alpha Pipeline v2 — 10-Dimension Signal Refactor
summary: Merged correlated dimensions (TREND+MTF→DIRECTIONAL), disabled noise source (SOCIAL), added three alpha dimensions grounded in documented market anomalies (PEAD, SHORT_SQUEEZE, OVERNIGHT_DRIFT), added IC auto-disable, and added small/micro cap universe track.

information_edge: DIRECTIONAL: EMA alignment + ADX + multi-timeframe vote — fast processing of price structure
PEAD: yfinance earnings dates — faster reaction to post-earnings drift than manual traders
SMALL_CAP_UNIVERSE: $50M-$2B market cap track — institutional blindspot
behavioral_edge: PEAD: Post-Earnings Announcement Drift — analysts systematically underreact to earnings surprises, drift 20-60 days
SHORT_SQUEEZE: High short float + volume surge — shorts forced to cover above stop levels (asymmetric)
OVERNIGHT_DRIFT: 90-day close-to-open statistics — equity risk premium accrues disproportionately overnight
execution_discipline: IC auto-disable: dimensions with 3 consecutive weeks negative IC are automatically disabled
Small cap position sizing: 5% max vs 10% for large cap (wider spreads, more risk)
Social short-circuit: saves 2-5s per scan cycle when dimension disabled
signal_decay_awareness: IC auto-disable: _check_ic_auto_disable() runs after every weekly IC update
IC auto-re-enable: recovers dimensions when IC > +0.01 for 2 consecutive weeks
Audit trail: IC_AUTO_DISABLE / IC_AUTO_ENABLE events logged to data/audit_log.jsonl

changes.merged: TREND + MTF → DIRECTIONAL (eliminates correlated IC weight splitting)
changes.disabled: SOCIAL set False in config.dimension_flags (IC auto-enable will re-activate if proven)

DIRECTIONAL.score: EMA alignment×ADX (0-5 pts) + MACD accel (0-2 pts) + TF vote (0-3 pts)

SHORT_SQUEEZE.data: Finviz quote.ashx scrape for short float %; yfinance for Donchian/volume

OVERNIGHT_DRIFT.anomaly: Equity risk premium accrues overnight (persistent anomaly)
OVERNIGHT_DRIFT.data: Derived from df_1d already fetched — zero extra API calls
OVERNIGHT_DRIFT.computation: Inside compute_indicators() for 1d timeframe, stored in sig_1d

ic_auto_disable.disable_rule: IC < -0.02 for 3 consecutive weekly updates → auto-disable via settings_override.json
ic_auto_disable.enable_rule: IC > +0.01 for 2 consecutive weekly updates → auto-re-enable

files_modified: config.py — dimension_flags, overnight/small-cap/IC-auto keys, settings_override loader
signal_pipeline.py — social short-circuit, small cap track (Stage 4b)

risks_mitigated.ic_history_invalidation: Expected. min_valid_records lowered to 10 to recover faster. Falls back to equal weights.
risks_mitigated.pead_latency: 6-hour earnings cache per symbol; broad try/except → (0,0) on failure
risks_mitigated.finviz_blocked: Graceful None return → score=0; 4h cache reduces call frequency
risks_mitigated.overnight_multiprocess: Computed inside compute_indicators() per worker; no cross-process cache needed
risks_mitigated.score_scale: 10 dims × 0.1 weight each = same 0-50 composite scale as 9-dim (IC normalisation handles it)
